response.original_title: Household Horrors - Yes, I am a Visitor
response.overview: From Goonies Productions come an all new thriller! An adaptation of Critical Reflex’s acclaimed game, “Yes, I am a Visitor” brings a fresh take on the apocalyptic decision-making setting of the game.
response.tagline: HOW DO I KNOW YOU’RE NOT ONE OF THINGS?
response.title: Household Horrors - Yes, I am a Visitor
